overview.description: Digital healthcare software for Czech hospitals, clinics and emergency services
overview.description_long: Bindworks s.r.o. builds digital health products for the Czech healthcare sector. Their portfolio includes ZUNI (AI-assisted wound documentation and care), bw Online (patient self-service and telemedicine platform), Mirek (AI medical documentation that auto-transcribes doctor-patient consultations), zCase (real-time hospital–ambulance integration), and Orbiso (personalized digital therapeutics). They run 15 projects across 78 clinics with 50,000+ users and a 4.9-star patient rating.
overview.tagline: Digitalizujeme zdravotní péči v Česku (Digitalising healthcare in Czechia)

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in September 2018 (IČO 07436505). Grew by building digital applications for major Czech healthcare institutions, most notably the IKEM Online app downloaded by 30,000+ patients.

key_milestones.event: Founded as Bindworks s.r.o. in Prague
IKEM Online wins appParade 2023 App of the Year
ZUNI wins Czech DIGI@MED Award from Roche
Received 140 million CZK (~$6.3M) grant from Technologická agentura ČR for Orbiso digital therapeutics platform

funding_rounds.lead_investor: Technologická agentura ČR (Technology Agency of the Czech Republic)

awards: Czech DIGI@MED Award by Roche (2024) — ZUNI app
appParade 2023 App of the Year — IKEM Online

metadata.notes: 140M CZK grant (~$6.3M USD at ~22 CZK/USD) from Technology Agency of Czech Republic confirmed by CzechCrunch article (Feb 17, 2026) for the Orbiso digital therapeutics platform. Grant is co-awarded with agency partner Debono. Employees range estimated from 'small teams' language on careers page and scale of operations.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Domain-specific focus (cv, document_processing) with proprietary tech or established customer base provides moat against foundation model commoditization.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Established customer base with proven market demand.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Some funding secured but early stage — sustainability depends on continued fundraising or reaching profitability.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Strong position across assessed risk dimensions with clear moats or stability factors.
